items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Mapping to canonical execution semantics,' but the evidence provided does not directly address this requirement. While there are multiple successful steps in the saga lifecycle, none of them confirm the existence or functionality of the required mapping to canonical execution semantics. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary evidence is lacking.
